title: ANC - changes are present after closing/opening the Settings screen
scenario: ANC level persists after closing and reopening the Settings screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to a specific value (e.g., High, Low, or a custom level).
4. Exit the Settings screen by pressing the back button or navigating to the Home screen.
5. Reopen the Settings screen by navigating to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting should remain unchanged from the value set in step 3.
